reviews.comment:

I filled up my car with fuel and tried to adjust the air pressure in the tires, but the car is running poorly. I don't know what the benefit of being a member here is.

reviews.comment:
La verdad estoy indignada, paramos a comer con mi flia y devolvimos 2 veces una hamburguesa que era vieja! No recibió ninguna disculpa, lo peor la segunda vez era tanta la indignación de mi esposo que le dijo al cajero que se la regalaba que era una tomada de pelo ... Cabe recalcar que como hamburguesas bastante seguido por viajar mucho y es la primera vez que ocurre un inconveniente así y tan mala atención del empleado.

(Translated by Google)
I'm truly outraged. My family and I stopped for a meal and had to return a hamburger twice because it was stale! They didn't even apologize. The worst part was that the second time, my husband was so indignant he told the cashier he was giving it to us for free that it was a rip-off. It's worth noting that I eat hamburgers quite often because I travel a lot, and this is the first time I've had such a problem and received such poor service from the employee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KaE5HMTZlR2RTTjFCWWRVZHJZelZJV0VkUU9YYxAB
